shared.no_history_available: Níor aimsíodh aon stair le fáil
shared.no_recent_broker_activity: Níor aimsíodh aon ghníomhaíocht bróicéir le déanaí

federation.activity_feed_desc: Amlíne de gach rud a tharla le bainc ama do chomhpháirtithe - teachtaireachtaí, malartuithe, liostaí roinnte agus athruithe comhpháirtíochta.
federation.allow_inbound_partnerships_desc: Nuair a bhíonn sé seo ar siúl, féadfaidh bainc ama eile iarraidh ort dul i gcomhpháirtíocht le do phobal. Déanann tú gach iarratas a athbhreithniú agus a fhaomhadh fós féin - mura gcuirtear formheas uathoibríoch ar siúl thíos.
federation.analytics_placeholder: Anailísíocht Chónaidhm ag teacht go luath
federation.api_docs_desc: API documentation for integrating with the federation network
federation.api_keys_desc: Eochracha a úsáideann do bhanc ama chun a chruthú cé hé nuair a nascann sé le bainc ama comhpháirtíochta agus córais iontaofa eile.
federation.auto_approve_partners: Comhpháirtithe nua a cheadú go huathoibríoch
federation.auto_approve_partners_desc: Nuair a bhíonn sé seo ar siúl, glactar le hiarratais chomhpháirtíochta ó bhainc ama eile láithreach, gan aon duine a sheiceáil ar dtús. Fágann formhór na bpobal as seo agus déanann comhordaitheoir athbhreithniú ar gach iarratas.
federation.balance_negative_desc: Tá creidmheasanna ama ag an bpobal seo dá chomhpháirtí
federation.balance_positive_desc: Tá cothromaíocht dhearfach ag an bpobal seo lena chomhpháirtí
federation.confirm_revoke: Caillfidh an córas a úsáideann an eochair seo rochtain láithreach. Ní féidir é seo a chealú.
federation.counter_propose_desc: Níl sé réidh glacadh leis mar atá? Roghnaigh an leibhéal comhpháirtíochta agus cad is féidir le baill a roinnt, ansin seol ar ais é le haghaidh athbhreithniú a dhéanamh ar an mbanc ama eile.
federation.create_api_key_desc: Cruthaigh eochair API nua chun rochtain sheachtrach ar do shonraí cónaidhm a chumasú
federation.credit_agreements_desc: Comhaontuithe malartaithe creidmheasa a bhainistiú le pobail chomhpháirtíochta
federation.data_management_desc: Export tenant-scoped Federation records, import supported partner records, and purge old logs.
federation.delete_partner_confirm: An bhfuil tú cinnte gur mhaith leat an comhpháirtí seo a scriosadh? Ní féidir é seo a chealú.
federation.desc_a_brief_description_of_your_communi: Cur síos gairid ar do phobal do chomhpháirtithe cónaidhm
federation.desc_create_an_a_p_i_key_to_enable_feder: Cruthaigh eochair API chun comhtháthú cónaidhm a chumasú
federation.desc_maximum_credits_that_can_be_exchang: Creidmheasanna uasta is féidir a mhalartú in aghaidh na míosa i gcomhaontuithe cónaidhm
federation.desc_no_federation_partnerships_have_bee: Níl tú i gcomhpháirtíocht le bainc ama ar bith eile fós. Brabhsáil an t-eolaire comhpháirtíochta chun pobail a aimsiú le nascadh leo.
federation.desc_public_contact_email_shown_to_partn: Ríomhphost teagmhála poiblí léirithe do phobail chomhpháirtíochta
federation.desc_the_public_name_of_your_community_i: Ainm poiblí do phobail i líonra na Cónaidhme
federation.enable_from_tenant_features: Cuir ar siúl é faoi Gnéithe Tionónta chun dul i gcomhpháirtíocht le bainc ama eile
federation.external_partners_desc: Ceangail an banc ama seo le comhpháirtithe a ritheann bogearraí eile, mar NEXUS, TimeOverflow, Komunitin, nó Credit Commons. Ligeann gach nasc don dá chóras oibriú le chéile.
federation.failed_to_add_tenant: Theip ar an tionónta a chur leis
federation.failed_to_counter_propose: Theip ar an moladh a chur i gcoinne
federation.failed_to_create_a_p_i_key_please_try_ag: Theip ar chruthú eochair API. Bain triail eile as
federation.key_create_failed: Theip ar chruthú eochair API. Bain triail eile as.
federation.failed_to_delete_neighborhood: Theip ar an chomharsanacht a scriosadh
federation.failed_to_load_federation_profile: Theip ar lódáil phróifíl an chónaidhm
federation.failed_to_load_federation_settings: Theip ar lódáil socruithe an chónaidhm
federation.failed_to_load_partnership_detail: Theip ar lódáil sonraí na comhpháirtíochta
federation.failed_to_remove_tenant: Theip ar an tionónta a bhaint
federation.failed_to_save_federation_settings: Theip ar shábháil socruithe an chónaidhm
federation.failed_to_send_partnership_request: Theip ar iarratas comhpháirtíochta a sheoladh
federation.failed_to_terminate_partnership: Theip ar an gcomhpháirtíocht a fhoirceannadh
federation.failed_to_update_federation_profile: Theip ar phróifíl an chónaidhm a nuashonrú
federation.feature_toggles: Cad a cheadaíonn an nasc seo
federation.federation_analytics_desc: Féach ar anailísíocht le haghaidh gníomhaíochta trasphobail agus sláinte comhpháirtíochta
federation.federation_enabled_desc: An máistir lasc. Cuir é seo ar siúl chun ligean do do phobal nascadh le bainc ama comhpháirtíochta. Seans go bhfeicfidh bainc ama eile sa líonra ainm do phobail, ach ní roinntear aon rud eile go dtí go gceadaíonn tú comhpháirtíocht.
federation.federation_profile_updated_successfully: D'éirigh le próifíl na Cónaidhme a nuashonrú
federation.federation_settings_desc: Déan cinneadh an féidir leis an bpobal seo dul i gcomhpháirtíocht le bainc ama eile, cé acu is féidir iarratais chomhpháirtíochta a sheoladh chugat, agus cé mhéad comhpháirtí is féidir a bheith agat.
federation.federation_settings_saved_successfully: D'éirigh le socruithe Cónaidhm a shábháil
federation.jwt_federation_auth_platform_intro: Nascann formhór na gcomhpháirtithe ag baint úsáide as eochracha a shocraigh tú do gach comhpháirtí isteach
federation.jwt_federation_auth_platform_middle: agus ní gá aon thus ardán. Má éilíonn comhpháirtí go sonrach le údar JWT, caithfidh sár-riarachán an ardáin a shocrú
federation.jwt_federation_auth_platform_suffix: i dtimpeallacht an fhreastalaí. Tá treoracha stádais agus socraithe beo faoi
federation.jwt_federation_auth_platform_title: Socraíonn oibreoir an ardáin síniú isteach comhpháirtí JWT
federation.import_read_failed: Theip ar léamh an chomhaid iompórtála
federation.import_users_desc: Iompórtáil úsáideoirí ó phobal comhpháirtíochta trí CSV
federation.label_feature_permissions: Cad is féidir le baill a roinnt
federation.max_partnerships_desc: Na bainc ama is comhpháirtíochta ar féidir le do phobal a bheith nasctha leo ag an am céanna.
federation.my_profile_desc: Cumraigh an chuma atá ar do phobal do phobail eile sa chónaidhm
federation.public_contact_email_desc: Ríomhphost teagmhála poiblí léirithe do phobail chomhpháirtíochta
federation.website_desc: Suíomh gréasáin poiblí don phobal seo.
federation.neighborhoods_desc: Bainistigh cnuasaigh chomharsanachta a ghrúpálann pobail ghaolmhara le chéile
federation.no_activity_desc: Níor tharla aon rud le bainc ama do pháirtí go fóill. Nuair a bheidh comhpháirtíochtaí gníomhach, beidh a ngníomhaíocht le feiceáil anseo.
federation.no_api_keys_desc: Níl uait ach eochair agus do bhanc ama á nascadh le banc ama comhpháirtíochta nó le córas iontaofa eile. Cruthaigh ceann nuair a iarrann páirtí é.
federation.no_communities_match_filters: Ní mheaitseálann pobail ar bith na scagairí
federation.no_external_partners: Níl aon ardáin chomhpháirtíochta nasctha fós
federation.not_enabled_for_tenant: Ní chuirtear comhpháirtíocht ar siúl don phobal seo
federation.partner_directory_desc: Brabhsáil eolaire na bpobal atá ar fáil chun dul i gcomhpháirtíocht leo
federation.partner_owes_us: Tá an Comhpháirtí faoi Dhualgas Linn
federation.partnership_message_placeholder: Teachtaireacht roghnach chuig an bpobal comhpháirtíochta...
federation.partnership_request_description: Iarr ar an mbanc ama seo dul i gcomhpháirtíocht le do cheann féin. Féadfaidh a gcomhordaitheoirí téarmaí éagsúla a ghlacadh, a dhiúltú nó a mholadh.
federation.partnerships_desc: Féach cé leis a bhfuil tú i gcomhpháirtíocht agus freagair iarratais comhpháirtíochta nua
federation.permissions_editable_when_active: Is féidir ceadanna a chur in eagar nuair a bhíonn an chomhpháirtíocht gníomhach
federation.placeholder_counter_message: Mínigh cén fáth a bhfuil tú ag moladh téarmaí difriúla (roghnach)...
federation.placeholder_optional_description_of_this: Cur síos Roghnach ar an gCnuasach Comharsanachta seo...
federation.suspend_agreement_confirm: An bhfuil tú cinnte gur mhaith leat an comhaontú seo a chur ar fionraí?
federation.terminate_agreement_confirm: Críochnaíonn sé seo do chomhaontú creidmheasa go buan le {{name}}. Ní féidir a thuilleadh creidmheasanna ama a mhalartú faoi, agus ní féidir é a chur ar siúl arís. Ní féidir é seo a chealú.
federation.terminate_partnership_confirm: Cuir deireadh leis an gcomhpháirtíocht seo? Caillfidh baill rochtain ar phróifílí, teachtaireachtaí agus malartuithe a chéile. Ní féidir é seo a chealú.
federation.webhooks_created_no_secret: Webook cruthaithe - níor gineadh aon rún sínithe
federation.webhooks_delete_confirm: An bhfuil tú cinnte gur mhaith leat an cuaille gréasáin seo a scriosadh?
federation.webhooks_delete_failed: Theip ar scriosadh an chuaille gréasáin
federation.webhooks_desc: Lig do chóras comhpháirtí a chur ar an eolas go huathoibríoch nuair a tharlaíonn rud éigin i do bhanc ama, mar theachtaireacht nua nó malartú críochnaithe.
federation.webhooks_events_required: Ní mór cineál imeachta amháin ar a laghad a roghnú
federation.webhooks_https_required: Caithfidh URL Webook HTTPS a úsáid
federation.webhooks_logs_failed: Theip ar lódáil na logaí cuaille gréasáin
federation.webhooks_no_logs: Níor aimsíodh aon logaí cuaille gréasáin
federation.webhooks_retry_failed: Theip ar triail eile a bhaint as cuaille gréasáin
federation.webhooks_save_failed: Theip ar shábháil an chuaille gréasáin
federation.webhooks_secret_warning: Stóráil an rún seo go slán - ní thaispeánfar arís é
federation.webhooks_test_success: D'éirigh leis an seachadadh tástála ({{code}}, {{time}} ms)
federation.webhooks_url_hint: An URL críochphointe a gheobhaidh imeachtaí cúnta gréasáin
federation.api_doc_api_key_plain_intro: Is pasfhocal an-fhada í eochair API. Nuair a chónaíonn tú le banc ama eile, tugann tú eochair API dóibh agus tugann siad ceann duit. Aon uair is gá dá n-ardán ceist a chur ortsa, seolann sé an eochair ionas go mbeidh a fhios agatsa go bhfuil an t-iarratas fíor.
federation.api_doc_api_key_plain_scope: Tá eochracha inchúlghairthe agus scóipeáladh, ionas gur féidir leat rochtain a chúlghairm nó eochair a theorannú do cheadanna inléite amháin.
federation.api_doc_error_bad_request_desc: Tá an comhlacht iarratais míchumtha nó tá réimsí riachtanacha in easnamh. Seiceáil an teachtaireacht earráide bailíochtaithe le haghaidh sonraí.
federation.api_doc_error_conflict_desc: Tagann an t-iarratas salach ar an staid reatha, mar idirbheart dúblach nó rogha an diúltaithe atá ann cheana féin.
federation.api_doc_error_forbidden_desc: Níl an scóip cheada riachtanach ag d'eochair API, nó tá an sprioc-acmhainn srianta.
federation.api_doc_error_format_intro: Leanann gach freagra earráide formáid chomhsheasmhach JSON:
federation.api_doc_error_internal_desc: Tharla earráid gan choinne. Déan teagmháil le tacaíocht má leanann an cheist.
federation.api_doc_error_not_found_desc: Níl an acmhainn iarrtha ann, nó níl rochtain ar an gcomhalta nó ar an liostú trí chónaidhm.
federation.api_doc_error_rate_limited_desc: An iomarca iarratas. Seiceáil an ceanntásc athshocraithe ráta-teorainn le haghaidh cathain is ceart triail eile a bhaint as.
federation.api_doc_error_unauthorized_desc: Dintiúir fíordheimhnithe in easnamh, neamhbhailí nó imithe in éag. Cinntigh go bhfuil d'eochair API nó JWT bailí.
federation.api_doc_example_api_key: Sampla: sonraí a léamh le heochair API
federation.api_doc_example_message: Sampla: teachtaireacht a sheoladh chuig ball comhpháirtíochta
federation.api_doc_header_nonce_desc: Teaghrán randamach uathúil in aghaidh an iarratais. Cosc ar ionsaithe athimirt.
federation.api_doc_header_platform_id_desc: D'aitheantóir ardáin, tógtha ó réimír eochrach d'eochair API.
federation.api_doc_header_signature_desc: Achoimre heicsidheachúlach HMAC-SHA256 den téad le síniú ag baint úsáid as do rún API.
federation.api_doc_header_timestamp_desc: Stampa ama Unix i soicindí. Diúltaítear iarratais atá níos sine ná 5 nóiméad.
federation.api_doc_payload_format_desc: Áirítear na réimsí caighdeánacha seo i ngach seachadadh cuaille gréasáin:
federation.api_doc_rate_limit_limit_desc: Uasmhéid iarratais in aghaidh na fuinneoige, réamhshocrú go 60 in aghaidh an nóiméid.
federation.api_doc_rate_limit_remaining_desc: Iarratais atá fágtha sa bhfuinneog reatha.
federation.api_doc_rate_limit_reset_desc: Stampa ama Unix nuair a athshocraíonn an fhuinneog.
federation.api_doc_signature_verification_desc: Sínítear gach seachadadh crúca gréasáin le do rún crúca gréasáin ag baint úsáide as HMAC-SHA256. Fíoraigh an síniú lena chinntiú go bhfuil an pálasta fíor agus nár cuireadh isteach air. Seoltar an síniú sa
federation.api_doc_signature_verification: Is fíorfhógra é fógra a sheiceáil
federation.api_doc_string_to_sign_desc: Comhcheangail an modh HTTP, cosán iomlán URL, stampa ama Unix, agus corp iarratais amh. Bain úsáid as teaghrán folamh le haghaidh iarratais GET gan aon chorp, agus scar gach cuid le carachtar nualíne.
federation.api_doc_webhook_events_desc: Gach rud is féidir le fógra uathoibríoch a spreagadh chuig córas comhpháirtíochta.
federation.api_doc_webhook_delivery_intro: Seoltar cuacha gréasáin mar iarratais POST chuig do chríochphointe HTTPS cumraithe. Cumraigh webooks ar an
federation.api_doc_webhook_event_connection_request: Seoladh iarratas ar nasc tras-ama bainc
federation.api_doc_webhook_event_listing_shared: Roinneadh liosta le líonra na Cónaidhme
federation.api_doc_webhook_event_message_received: Fuair ​​ball i do bhanc ama teachtaireacht chónasctha
federation.api_doc_webhook_event_message_sent: Seoladh teachtaireacht chónasctha ó do bhanc ama
federation.api_doc_webhook_event_partnership_reques: Seoladh iarratas comhpháirtíochta nua chuig do bhanc ama
federation.api_doc_webhook_plain_intro: Is éard atá i gcuag gréasáin ná fógra a sheoltar nuair a tharlaíonn rud éigin ar do thaobh a gcaithfidh an taobh eile a bheith ar an eolas faoi láithreach, mar shampla aistriú cealaithe nó teachtaireacht nua.
federation.api_doc_webhook_signed: Sínítear gach cuaille gréasáin. Diúltaítear brionnú go huathoibríoch.
federation.api_doc_federation_agreement: Caithfidh an dá thaobh aontú sula n-osclaíonn an droichead, agus is féidir leis an dá thaobh é a dhúnadh ag am ar bith.
federation.api_doc_federation_intro: Ligeann Cónaidhm do bhanc ama labhairt le banc ama eile. Nuair a bhíonn an nasc oscailte, is féidir le baill creidmheasanna ama a sheoladh, teachtaireacht a chur dá chéile, liostaí a chéile a fheiceáil, agus léirmheasanna a fhágáil trasna an droichid.
federation.api_doc_overview_title: Tosaigh anseo - cónaidhm i mBéarla simplí
federation.api_doc_overview_subtitle: Le haghaidh riarthóirí neamhtheicniúla. Gan béarlagair.
federation.api_doc_rule_of_thumb: Riail ordóige: Láimhseálann eochracha API iarratais a dhéanann tú de réir a chéile. Láimhseálann cuacha gréasáin iontas nach mór duit fios a bheith agat fúthu gan fiafraí.
federation.api_doc_safeguard_duplicate_webhook: IDs agus nonces uathúil. Déantar neamhaird de dhúblaigh.
federation.api_doc_safeguard_fake_webhook: Sínítear gach cuaille gréasáin. Diúltaítear fakes go huathoibríoch.
federation.api_doc_safeguard_global_trust: Díchumasaíonn lasc marú ar fud an ardáin i sár-riaracháin an chónaidhm i ngach áit láithreach.
federation.api_doc_safeguard_partner_down: Seachadadh scuaine le hathiarratais. Stopann scoradáin chiorcaid glaonna arís agus arís eile chuig comhpháirtí as líne.
federation.api_doc_safeguard_partner_misbehaves: Teorainneacha ráta in aghaidh an chomhpháirtí, lasca marú in aghaidh an ghné, agus fionraí aon-cliceáil.
federation.api_doc_safeguard_stolen_key: Cúlghairm i gceann cliceáil. Cruthaigh eochair nua i soicindí.
federation.api_doc_safeguards_title: Cad a d'fhéadfadh dul mícheart? (agus cad a dhéanaimid faoi)
federation.api_doc_scenario_reading_listings: Ag léamh liostaí bainc ama eile
federation.api_doc_scenario_receiving_messages: Ag fáil teachtaireachtaí ón taobh eile
federation.api_doc_scenario_transfer_cancelled: Cuireadh ar ceal é nuair a dúradh leat aistriú a sheol tú
federation.api_doc_setup_step_agree: Aontaíonn an dá riarthóir cónascadh. Ní thosaíonn aon rud gan an dá thaobh a rá go bhfuil.
federation.api_doc_setup_step_features: Cas ar na gnéithe is mian leat a roinnt, ag tosú leis na roghanna is sábháilte.
federation.api_doc_setup_step_handshake: Tástáil an croitheadh ​​láimhe. Seolann cliceáil amháin iarratas tástála, agus ciallaíonn glas go bhfuil sé ag obair.
federation.api_doc_setup_step_keys: Malartú API eochracha. Greamaigh a gcuid Comhpháirtithe Seachtracha agus coinnigh mise slán.
federation.api_doc_setup_step_partner: Aimsigh comhpháirtí a ritheann bogearraí cónaidhme comhoiriúnach.
federation.api_doc_setup_step_webhooks: Malartú URLs cuaille gréasáin más mian leat imeachtaí fíor-ama.
federation.api_doc_setup_title: Conas a bhunóidh mé nasc? (6 chéim)
federation.api_doc_summary_body: Is ionann Cónaidhm agus dhá bhanc ama a chomhaontaíonn gníomhú mar aon líonra amháin. Ligeann eochracha API dóibh ceisteanna a chur ar a chéile. Cuireann cuacha gréasáin an taobh eile ar an eolas nuair a tharlaíonn rud éigin práinneach. Tá gach rud sínithe, inchúlghairthe, agus as de réir réamhshocraithe go dtí go ndeir an dá thaobh go bhfuil.
federation.api_doc_technical_tabs_hint: Réidh le haghaidh na sonraí teicniúla? Bain úsáid as na cluaisíní eile thuas: Fíordheimhniú, Críochphointí, Samplaí, Cóid Earráide, agus Cluaisíní Gréasáin.
federation.api_doc_worry_global_trust: Caillimid muinín go hiomlán as an gcónaidhm
federation.api_doc_worry_partner_misbehaves: Déanann comhpháirtí mí-iompair le turscar nó calaois
federation.api_doc_worry_stolen_key: Goideadh duine éigin ár n-eochair API
federation.cc_config_desc: Socraigh conas a nascann an banc ama seo le líonra Credit Commons — a ainm sa líonra, an mol a nascann sé, agus conas a athraíonn a chuid uaireanta
federation.cc_node_slug_desc: Ainm gearr uathúil do bhanc ama sa líonra Credit Commons. Bain úsáid as 3-15 litreacha beaga, uimhreacha nó fleiscíní.
federation.cc_parent_url_desc: Seoladh gréasáin an mhoil Credit Commons a nascann an banc ama seo tríd. Fág folamh mura bhfuil an banc ama seo ceangailte le mol.
federation.confirm_approve_partnership: An chomhpháirtíocht seo a cheadú? Beidh baill den dá bhanc ama in ann a chéile a fheiceáil agus idirghníomhú leo, bunaithe ar na ceadanna comhroinnte a shocraigh tú.
federation.confirm_delete_neighborhood: An bhfuil tú cinnte gur mhaith leat comharsanacht a scriosadh?
federation.confirm_purge_body: This permanently deletes old federation audit and API log entries outside the retention window.
federation.confirm_reject_partnership: An bhfuil fonn ort diúltú don iarratas seo? Cuirfear an banc ama eile ar an eolas. Is féidir leat dul i gcomhpháirtíocht leo níos déanaí má athraíonn rudaí.
federation.confirm_remove_tenant: An bhfuil tú cinnte gur mhaith leat an tionónta a bhaint?
federation.exchange_rate_must_be_positive: Ní mór don Ráta Malairte a bheith Dearfach
federation.export_all_desc: Download a tenant-scoped JSON archive of Federation configuration, partner records, member settings, messages, connections, internal transactions, directory profile, neighbourhoods, credit agreements, reputation records, and logs.
federation.export_item_internal_activity: Member settings, messages, connections, internal transactions, directory profile, neighbourhoods, and credit agreements
federation.export_loaded_only: Ní áirítear leis ach na hiontrálacha a luchtaítear thíos
federation.export_secrets_note: API keys and signing secrets are redacted.
federation.failed_to_load_analytics: Theip ar an anailísíocht a lódáil
federation.failed_to_update_topics: Theip ar na topaicí a nuashonrú
federation.import_desc: Restores partnerships and external partner records from a Federation JSON export. Use dry-run before committing.
federation.import_dry_run_hint: Validates the file and reports what would change without writing records.
federation.monthly_limit_must_be_positive: Ní mór Teorainn Mhíosúil a bheith Dearfach
federation.no_recent_errors: Níor aimsíodh aon earráidí le déanaí
federation.protocol_type_desc: Roghnaigh na bogearraí a ritheann an banc ama comhpháirtíochta. Comhlánaítear na socruithe teicniúla cearta duit.
federation.purge_desc: Delete federation audit and API log entries older than the selected retention window.
federation.reactivate_partnership_confirm: An chomhpháirtíocht seo a athghníomhachtú? Gheobhaidh baill den dá bhanc ama rochtain ar a chéile arís.
federation.webhooks_sample_message: Seo seachadadh tástála ó Project NEXUS Federation
federation.webhooks_test_note: Is sonraí samplacha amháin é seo. Ní sheoltar aon rud fíor agus ní chuirtear isteach ar aon bhall.
federation.webhooks_test_preview_desc: Seolann sé seo fógra tástála neamhdhíobhálach chuig an seoladh thíos ionas gur féidir leat na hoibreacha ceangail a sheiceáil. Níl aon sonraí ball fíor san áireamh.

analytics.description: Féach cé mhéad atá ag tarlú le bainc ama do pháirtí agus an bhfuil na naisc sláintiúil.
analytics.no_recent_errors: Níor aimsíodh aon earráidí le déanaí
analytics.title: Anailísí Cónaidhm

federation.no_external_partners_hint: Ceangail banc ama comhpháirtíochta a ritheann NEXUS, TimeOverflow, Komunitin, nó Credit Commons chun tosú ag obair le chéile.
federation.no_logs_hint: Taispeánfar an ghníomhaíocht anseo nuair a bheidh an nasc seo in úsáid. Rith seiceáil nasc chun an chéad iontráil a chruthú.
federation.cc_standalone_note: Níl sé ceangailte le mol fós. Oibríonn an banc ama seo leis féin go dtí go gcuireann tú seoladh moil isteach.
federation.level_desc_discovery: Is féidir leis an dá bhanc ama a chéile a aimsiú san eolaire. Ní féidir le baill idirghníomhú go fóill.
federation.level_desc_social: Is féidir le baill próifílí a chéile a fheiceáil agus teachtaireachtaí a sheoladh idir an dá bhanc ama.
federation.level_desc_economic: Is féidir le baill creidmheasanna ama a mhalartú freisin agus freagra a thabhairt ar thairiscintí agus iarratais a chéile.
federation.level_desc_integrated: Comhpháirtíocht iomlán — is féidir le baill imeachtaí agus grúpaí a roinnt ar fud an dá bhanc ama.
federation.permission_desc_profiles: Is féidir le baill den dá bhanc ama próifílí a chéile a fheiceáil
federation.permission_desc_messaging: Is féidir le baill teachtaireachtaí a sheoladh chuig a chéile
federation.permission_desc_transactions: Is féidir le baill creidmheasanna ama a mhalartú lena chéile
federation.permission_desc_listings: Is féidir le baill tairiscintí agus iarratais a chéile a fheiceáil
federation.permission_desc_events: Is féidir le baill imeachtaí a chéile a fheiceáil agus páirt a ghlacadh iontu
federation.permission_desc_groups: Is féidir le baill grúpaí a chéile a fheiceáil agus a bheith páirteach iontu
federation.webhooks_empty_hint: Cuir ceann leis chun córas comhpháirtí a chur ar an eolas go huathoibríoch nuair a tharlaíonn rud éigin i do bhanc ama.
federation.webhooks_no_logs_hint: Beidh seachadtaí le feiceáil anseo nuair a thosaíonn an cuaille gréasáin seo fógraí a sheoladh.
federation.rotate_secret_confirm_title: An bhfuil fonn ort an eochair sínithe a ionadú?
federation.rotate_secret_confirm_body: Cruthaítear eochair sínithe nua láithreach agus stopann an seancheann ag obair. Feicfidh bainc ama comhpháirtíochta a sheiceálann do staitisticí comhroinnte earráidí go dtí go dtabharfaidh tú an eochair nua dóibh. Ní féidir an seaneochair a aisghabháil.
federation.no_credit_agreements_hint: Cruthaigh comhaontú chun tús a chur le creidmheasanna ama a mhalartú le banc ama comhpháirtíochta.
federation.no_balances_hint: Taispeántar iarmhéideanna anseo nuair a thosaíonn creidmheasanna ama ag bogadh idir tú féin agus banc ama comhpháirtíochta.

shared.fit_intro: Partner Timebanks has four different jobs: choosing who your community trusts, deciding what the partnership is allowed to do, configuring any external protocol or API connection, and monitoring the activity that follows.

settings.title: Start here before connecting partner timebanks
settings.summary: This page controls whether federation is available for this tenant and what the default partnership rules are. It is not where you add a specific external API connection.
settings.fit: Use this page for the tenant-wide switch, inbound partnership policy, and default limits. A setting here affects every partner relationship that follows.
settings.avoid: Do not paste partner credentials here. Use External Protocol Partners for credentials you received from another timebank, or Inbound API Partners for credentials you issue to a third-party system.
settings.step_1_body: Turn federation on only when the tenant is ready to appear in partner workflows.
settings.step_2_body: Decide whether inbound partnership requests need manual approval and how many active partnerships this community should maintain.
settings.step_3_body: After saving this page, use Directory and Partnerships for NEXUS tenants, or External Protocol Partners for a non-NEXUS protocol endpoint.

partnerships.title: Manage trusted NEXUS-to-NEXUS relationships
partnerships.summary: Partnerships are bilateral trust agreements between NEXUS communities. They are separate from protocol endpoints, API keys, and webhook subscriptions.
partnerships.fit: Use this page when the partner is another NEXUS tenant and you need to approve, reject, suspend, reactivate, or review the permissions for that relationship.
partnerships.avoid: Do not use this page for TimeOverflow, Komunitin, Credit Commons, or generic third-party API clients. Those belong in the protocol or API sections.
partnerships.step_1_body: Pending means someone has requested trust; active means cross-community features may run; suspended pauses access without deleting history.
partnerships.step_2_body: Profiles, messages, listings, transactions, events, and groups can be enabled independently. Only grant what the partnership actually needs.
partnerships.step_3_body: If time credits will move between communities, create or review a Credit Agreement before enabling transaction permissions.

directory.title: Find NEXUS communities before requesting trust
directory.summary: The directory is a discovery page. It helps admins find other NEXUS tenants and request a partnership. It does not configure API protocols.
directory.fit: Use this page to search visible communities, compare what they share publicly, and send a partnership request.
directory.avoid: Do not use the directory for external systems that are not NEXUS tenants. Configure those under External Protocol Partners or Inbound API Partners.
directory.step_1_body: Use region, category, and topic filters to find communities that match the practical partnership need.
directory.step_2_body: Check whether the community exposes profiles, listings, messaging, transactions, events, or groups before requesting trust.
directory.step_3_body: Include why the connection is needed and which capabilities you expect to use.

creditAgreements.title: Use this page only when time credits cross a partnership
creditAgreements.summary: Credit Agreements define how time credits move between partner timebanks. They are a financial trust layer on top of a partnership, not a generic API connection.
creditAgreements.fit: Use this page when two communities have agreed that members may earn or spend time credits across the relationship.
creditAgreements.avoid: Do not enable credit movement just because profiles, listings, or messages are federated. Transactions should stay off until the partnership has an explicit credit agreement.
creditAgreements.step_1_body: Start with a trusted partner tenant. If the partner does not appear, create or approve the partnership first.
creditAgreements.step_2_body: Confirm the exchange rate, monthly limit, and settlement expectations before activating the agreement.
creditAgreements.step_3_body: Use the balance and activity views to spot unusual net exposure between communities.

externalPartners.title: Configure external timebank protocols here
externalPartners.summary: External Protocol Partners is for outbound or bidirectional connections to another timebank platform or protocol such as NEXUS federation endpoints, TimeOverflow, Komunitin, or Credit Commons.
externalPartners.fit: Use this page when NEXUS needs to call a partner's federation API, store their base URL, choose a protocol type, and record the authentication method needed for that protocol.
externalPartners.avoid: Do not use this page to issue credentials to a bank, payment processor, municipal system, or other system that calls NEXUS. Use Inbound API Partners for those clients.
externalPartners.step_1_body: Select NEXUS, TimeOverflow, Komunitin, or Credit Commons before filling the endpoint path. The protocol decides what the URL and credentials mean.
externalPartners.step_2_body: Use API key, HMAC, or OAuth only when that partner's protocol requires it. Leave unrelated credential fields blank.
externalPartners.step_3_body: Run a health check and inspect the logs before marking the partner active.

apiKeys.title: Issue outgoing keys for federation requests
apiKeys.summary: Outgoing API Keys identify this tenant when it makes federation requests. They are not the same as Partner API client credentials issued to third-party systems.
apiKeys.fit: Use this page for keys used by federation integrations and trusted partner timebank workflows.
apiKeys.avoid: Do not hand these to unrelated external systems. If a third-party system needs to call NEXUS, provision it under Inbound API Partners.
apiKeys.step_1_title: Name the key for its relationship.
apiKeys.step_1_body: Use a name that identifies the partner, purpose, and environment so future admins know why it exists.
apiKeys.step_2_body: Grant only the federation capabilities needed for that relationship.
apiKeys.step_3_body: Remove expired, unused, or compromised keys immediately and confirm the partner has switched to the replacement.

apiDocs.title: Use this guide to explain the protocol stack
apiDocs.summary: The Protocol API Guide documents federation authentication, endpoints, examples, errors, and webhook events. It is a reference page, not a configuration page.
apiDocs.fit: Use this page when an admin or developer needs to understand how NEXUS federation APIs, API keys, protocol endpoints, and webhooks relate to each other.
apiDocs.avoid: Do not create credentials from this page. Follow the links to External Protocol Partners, Outgoing API Keys, Event Webhooks, or Inbound API Partners depending on who is calling whom.
apiDocs.step_1_body: Read the plain-English overview before copying endpoint examples. It explains the difference between API keys and webhooks.
apiDocs.step_2_body: Use Authentication for signatures and keys, Endpoints for request paths, Examples for payloads, and Webhooks for event delivery.
apiDocs.step_3_title: Match docs to the actual setup page.
apiDocs.step_3_body: After reading the reference, return to the relevant setup page rather than guessing where a credential belongs.

webhooks.title: Configure event notifications sent by NEXUS
webhooks.summary: Event Webhooks notify another system when something happens. They complement API keys, which are used when a system deliberately calls an endpoint.
webhooks.fit: Use this page when a trusted partner needs near-real-time notifications about federation events such as messages, profile updates, listings, or transactions.
webhooks.avoid: Do not use webhooks as a replacement for partnership approval or API authentication. The receiving endpoint still needs a trusted relationship and a signing secret.
webhooks.step_1_body: Use HTTPS and a URL owned by the receiving partner or system.
webhooks.step_2_body: Subscribe to the smallest set of event types the receiver actually needs.
webhooks.step_3_body: Send a test payload, then use the delivery logs to catch repeated failures before they become silent data loss.

creditCommons.title: Configure this tenant's Credit Commons identity
creditCommons.summary: Credit Commons settings describe this community as a node in a mutual credit network. This is not payment-card configuration.
creditCommons.fit: Use this page only when this tenant participates in a Credit Commons style federation or needs a parent node, node slug, exchange rate, and validation window.
creditCommons.avoid: Do not use this page for Stripe, card payments, member subscriptions, or Partner API credentials.
creditCommons.step_1_body: The node slug and display name must match the agreed Credit Commons network identity.
creditCommons.step_2_body: Add the parent node URL and slug only when the tenant belongs under another Credit Commons node.
creditCommons.step_3_body: Use the validation window and hashchain status to confirm the node is aligned with the wider network.

apiPartners.title: Issue inbound Partner API credentials here
apiPartners.summary: Inbound API Partners is for external systems that call NEXUS: banks, payment processors, municipal admin systems, reporting tools, or other approved third-party clients.
apiPartners.fit: Use this page when you need to create a client ID and client secret, set scopes, rate limits, sandbox mode, or suspend a client that calls the Partner API.
apiPartners.avoid: Do not use this page for another timebank platform that NEXUS calls through a federation protocol. Use External Protocol Partners for that case.
apiPartners.step_1_body: Record the partner name and contact email so credentials can be rotated or suspended with a known owner.
apiPartners.step_2_body: Choose the minimum scopes, rate limit, IP allowlist, and sandbox mode before revealing the secret.
apiPartners.step_3_title: Treat the secret as one-time material.
apiPartners.step_3_body: The client secret is shown once. Share it securely and regenerate it if there is any doubt.

dataManagement.title: Export, import, and purge federation records carefully
dataManagement.summary: Data Management is an operational page for federation records. It is not where relationships, credentials, or protocol settings are created.
dataManagement.fit: Use this page for controlled exports, dry-run imports, committed imports, and log purges across federation data.
dataManagement.avoid: Do not use import as a shortcut around approval workflows. Partnerships and credentials should still be reviewed in their own pages.
dataManagement.step_1_body: Run the import preview first so invalid or duplicate records are visible before anything changes.
dataManagement.step_2_body: Exports may include sensitive partnership and API log metadata. Store files securely.
dataManagement.step_3_body: Before deleting old logs, confirm the retention period and audit requirements for the tenant.

activityFeed.title: Audit what actually happened across partner timebanks
activityFeed.summary: The Activity Feed is the timeline of federation actions. It helps explain cross-tenant events after partnerships and integrations are configured.
activityFeed.fit: Use this page to investigate messages, transactions, profile views, listing sharing, partnership changes, and API-triggered federation events.
activityFeed.avoid: Do not treat the activity feed as configuration. It is evidence and troubleshooting context.
activityFeed.step_1_body: Narrow the timeline to messages, transactions, listings, partnership changes, or searches.
activityFeed.step_2_body: Inbound and outbound events tell different stories. Use partner filters when investigating a specific relationship.
activityFeed.step_3_body: If the activity reveals repeated failures, move to the relevant configuration page and fix the underlying relationship, key, or webhook.

analytics.title: Use analytics for performance, not setup
analytics.summary: Federation Analytics summarizes partner timebank health and usage. It helps admins understand whether configured relationships are working.
analytics.fit: Use this page to compare volume, trends, partner health, and adoption across federation features.
analytics.avoid: Do not use analytics to infer that permissions are correct. Verify permissions in Partnerships and credentials in the protocol/API pages.
analytics.step_1_body: Look for error spikes, stale partner activity, or unusual transaction patterns.
analytics.step_2_body: Use partner-level views to separate one broken relationship from a wider federation issue.
analytics.step_3_body: Use Activity Feed, External Protocol Partners, Webhooks, or Credit Agreements to investigate the cause behind the metric.

aggregates.title: Share or review aggregate data only
aggregates.summary: Aggregates are cross-node summaries. They are not individual member records, credentials, or partnership permissions.
aggregates.fit: Use this page when national, regional, or network-level reporting needs summary federation metrics.
aggregates.avoid: Do not use aggregates to move personal data between communities. Use the appropriate partnership and data-sharing controls first.
aggregates.step_1_body: Make sure the aggregate is required for network governance, public reporting, or approved research.
aggregates.step_2_body: Review which metrics are included and whether any small-count privacy risk exists.
aggregates.step_3_body: Use timestamps and related analytics to confirm the aggregate reflects current partner activity.
